title: Conjugue da forma correta
answer: GO
end: (go) out tonight, I will go to the mall

title: Repita a frase
answer: If I go out tonight, I will go to the mall
a: If I go out tonight I will go to the mall
translate: Se eu sair essa noite, eu irei ao shopping

title: Conjugue da forma correta
answer: BE
start: If you get back late, I'll
